payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Partial/edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden dresser showing a glossy rectangular top with visible wood grain and minor surface wear, and two lower drawer fronts with round dark knobs visible; appears close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m).
